Description: The average of the minimum daily wind speed at 10 meters above the surface of the earth.
Alternates: Mean Minimum Wind Speed at 10 Meters,Average Calm Surface Wind
Keywords: Mean Minimum Wind Speed at 10 Meters,Average Calm Surface Wind
Warnings: Wind speed is provided from an average of a large area and may not represent a point location due to surface properties, elevation changes, and local weather phenomena.

Name_EN: Wind Speed at 10 Meters Range

Keywords: Wind Speed Range at 10 Meters,Diurnal Wind Speed Range at 10m,Wind/Pressure
Warnings: Wind speed is provided from an average of a large area and may not represent a point location due to surface properties, elevation changes, and local weather phenomena.

Name: Velocidad del viento corregida (ajustada por la elevación)
Name_EN: Corrected Wind Speed (Adjusted For Elevation)
Description: Wind speed associated with the MERRA-2 grid adjusted using the Gipe Power Law and the elevation difference between the average elevation of the grid cell and the elevation of the underlying surface.
Alternates: Adjusted Wind Speed,Corrected Surface Wind Speed
Keywords: Adjusted Wind Speed,Corrected Surface Wind Speed

Name: Rugosidad de la superficie
Name_EN: Surface Roughness
Description: The height above the displacement plane at which the mean wind becomes zero when extrapolating the logarithmic wind speed profile downward through the surface layer.
Alternates: Aerodynamic Roughness Length,Roughness Length for Momentum,Surface Roughness Length,Terrain Roughness Parameter
Keywords: Aerodynamic Roughness Length,Roughness Length for Momentum,Surface Roughness Length,Terrain Roughness Parameter
